queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how savings balances below 100 DM function as protective determinants of default in consumer credit portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Investigating the role of the absence of known savings accounts as mitigating credit risk drivers in lowering personal loan default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Assessing the correlation between negative checking account balances and reduced credit default risk in retail lending frameworks.
